column_comment: Total historical revenue in EGP. Filter > 1000 for high-value customers.
ENUM. Valid: Low Value, Mid Value, High Value.
ENUM. Valid: High, Medium, Low.
Final item price in EGP after discount. Use for revenue SUM.
ENUM (lowercase only): delivered, canceled, shipped, processing, invoiced, unavailable. ETL must call LOWER() before insert.
Positive = late delivery. > 14 triggers delayed_delivery_compensation leakage.
Decimal 0.0-1.0. DO NOT multiply by 100 when filtering. Values > 0.50 indicate high_discount_negative_profit leakage.
Profit / Revenue. Negative = leakage. Filter: profit_margin < 0.
ENUM: approved, partial, unpaid, missing. missing = no payment record (leakage: delivered_no_payment).
GENERATED (immutable). First day of purchase month in Africa/Cairo time. Use for monthly GROUP BY.
GENERATED (immutable). First day of purchase quarter in Africa/Cairo time. Use for quarterly GROUP BY.
ENUM: credit_card, debit_card, voucher, cash_on_delivery.
List price in EGP. Actual sale price is order_items.price_after_discount.
ENUM: incorrect_refund, return_request, early_refund, late_delivery_compensation, item_not_as_described, customer_request.
TRUE = second refund for same order. Leakage: duplicate_refund.
TRUE = refund issued before order cancelled. Leakage: refund_before_cancellation.
ENUM: positive, neutral, negative, mixed, unknown. negative on a delivered order is a strong leakage signal.
Return ratio 0.0-1.0. Filter > 0.15 for high-risk sellers.
Count of payment disputes. High values indicate suspicious activity.
ENUM: delivered, in_transit, cancelled, failed, never_shipped, pending. never_shipped = payment_approved_never_shipped leakage.

generation_expression:
CASE
    WHEN (actual_logistics_cost > (0)::numeric) THEN round((shipping_fee_charged / actual_logistics_cost), 4)
    ELSE NULL::numeric
END
column_comment: GENERATED. fee_charged / actual_cost. > 2.5 = wrong_shipping_fee leakage.
Groups all turns of one chat session. Use UUID.
Higher = more anomalous. Low < 0.40 | Medium 0.40-0.65 | High 0.65-0.80 | Critical > 0.80.
Array of leakage ENUMs. Filter: WHERE 'duplicate_refund' = ANY(leakage_scenarios).
